world_name: World of Darkness - Vampire: The Masquerade
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: World of Darkness / Vampire: The Masquerade inspired gothic-punk horror atlas for the terrain type dual_continent.
Scene/backdrop: two major gothic-punk continents under eternal night, separated by uneven black seas and narrow straits, with vampire clan domains, Elysium masquerade districts, haunted cemeteries, sewer warrens, cathedral cities, fog-filled parks, ruined havens, Anarch territories, Camarilla courts, Sabbat war zones and occult wilderness.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated gothic vampire atlas, noir domain cartography, dark parchment, silver ink and deep crimson accents, fog, shadows, blood moon glow, political horror atmosphere.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map, asymmetric continents of different sizes; the dark sea separation is diagonal and S-shaped with C-shaped gulfs, L-shaped channels and jagged straits, not a simple vertical divider; include black compass rose, ornate gothic border, clan-domain boundaries, cemetery icons, Elysium symbols and hidden sewer-route traces without readable text.
Geography constraints: realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, capes, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, foggy estuaries, inland seas, cliff coasts and varied landforms; span gloomy megacities, old forests, moors, mountains, wetlands, snowfields, plague-dark countryside and haunted harbors.
Avoid: bright heroic fantasy, clean modern tourist map, mirrored continents, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
